title: TechnoTotem
description: Adds a powerful variant of the totem of undying, because Technoblade never dies.
body:
# TechnoTotem

On July 1st, 2022, a [video](https://youtu.be/DPMluEVUqS0) uploaded on YouTuber Technoblade's channel, announced his death to his fans around the world. We are all sorry to hear that, so I decided to make a mod as a tribute to him for his great courage against cancer.

This mod adds a new item - **Totem of Technoblade**. It works just like the original Totem of Undying, yet stores kills against entities with a max health value of 20 or more and can be used for multiple times depending on stored kills. Not only that, but it also takes effect when you fall out of the world.

You ask why? Because **Technoblade never dies**.
